query: Do marketing for this project. I just want to get the word out, handle everything from strategy to publishing.
Market this. I have no idea where to start but I want content published by end of day.
Run the full marketing pipeline. I already have a strategy.md and some draft content, just pick up where I left off.
I need to do marketing for my SaaS tool. Whatever is missing, fill it in and get something shipped.
One-click marketing please. Take it from zero to published, I trust the defaults.
forbotsake-go. Run the whole thing end to end.
Help me publish my marketing. I have strategy and content already, just need the remaining steps done.
I want to launch marketing for this repo. Figure out what stage I'm at and do the rest automatically.
Ship my marketing. I've been building this CLI tool for months and have zero presence online. Handle everything.
Run the pipeline for me. I think I have some content drafted but I'm not sure what's left to do.
Do all the marketing stuff. Strategy, content, review, publish. The works.
I just want marketing done. Detect what exists and run whatever stages are remaining.
How should I market this? I built a developer tool and I have no idea who my audience is or what channels to use. Help me think through positioning.
I need a go-to-market strategy. What should my positioning be and who is the ideal customer? Walk me through it.
Review my strategy and tell me if my positioning is strong enough. I think the ICP section is weak.
Challenge my marketing plan. I wrote strategy.md but I'm not confident the channel choices make sense for a B2B dev tool.
Review this blog post before I publish it. Check if it matches my strategy and reads well.
Is this LinkedIn post ready to publish? Check the tone and make sure it doesn't sound like AI slop.
What should I post this week? Build me a content calendar based on my strategy.
Create a content plan for the next two weeks. I want a mix of X threads and LinkedIn posts.
Write a Twitter thread about our new feature launch. Make it punchy, aimed at developers.
Draft a blog post about why we built this tool. Target senior engineers who are frustrated with existing solutions.
Set up auto-posting on a schedule. I want my reviewed content to go out every morning at 9am without me doing anything.
Publish this post to X right now. The content in content/launch-thread.md is reviewed and ready.
Who is my ideal customer? I need deep audience research. What are their pain points and where do they hang out online?
What are my competitors doing for marketing? I want to see what Vercel and Netlify post on social and what gets engagement.
How do I approach the VP of Engineering at Stripe? I want a targeted outreach plan to get their attention.
What worked this week? Show me a marketing retrospective with engagement numbers and lessons learned.
Upgrade forbotsake to the latest version.
